## Security checklist

- [ ] No `.env` or real API keys committed
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets in source files or test fixtures

## Checklist

- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` (user-visible changes only)
- [ ] No breaking changes to existing bot UX or pipeline
- [ ] PR is focused on one concern
